title: Merged Mining
description: Merged mining lets miners use the same proof-of-work to secure more than one compatible blockchain. An auxiliary chain can accept work demonstrated by a parent-chain block, allowing miners to earn additional rewards without proportionally increasing hashing work.

resources.title: Bitcoin Wiki: Merged Mining
resources.notes: Conceptual and protocol overview of auxiliary proof-of-work.

resources.title: Merge Mining Monitor
resources.notes: Operational view of merged-mining activity and supported networks.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for proof-of-work, mining incentives, and block validation.
